node.name: note.txt
node.rich_text:
Hello Heath ! Grimmie has setup the test website for the new academy. I told him not to use the same password everywhere, he will change it ASAP.
I couldn't create a user via the admin panel, so instead I inserted directly into the database with the following command:
INSERT INTO `students` (`StudentRegno`, `studentPhoto`, `password`, `studentName`, `pincode`, `session`, `department`, `semester`, `cgpa`, `creationdate`, `updationDate`) VALUES ('10201321', '', 'cd73502828457d15655bbd7a63fb0bc8', 'Rum Ham', '777777', '', '', '', '7.60', '2021-05-29 14:36:56', '');
The StudentRegno number is what you use for login.
Le me know what you think of this open-source project, it's from 2020 so it should be secure... right ? We can always adapt it to our needs.
-jdelta
